up.method: reported (Vmax = mumax/Y; nonlinear regression of respiration rates)
calculated: 0.72 fmol O2 cell-1 h-1 / 108 fg cell-1 = 0.72/108 mol gDW-1 h-1 = 6.67 mmol gDW-1 h-1
reported (electron flow rate per cell to O2)

yields.Y_e-O2_gCDW_per_mol_e: 11 +/- 0.8 g CDW mol-1 e- to O2

growth_records.cite: Hiis et al. Unlocking bacterial potential to reduce farmland N2O emissions. Nature (2024). DOI:10.1038/s41586-024-07464-3. [PMC11168931]
growth_records.snippet: mumaxO2 = 0.29 h-1 (s.d. = 0.006) ... VmaxO2 = 0.72 fmol O2 per cell per hour ... Vmax e-O2 = 2.9 fmol of electrons to O2 per cell per hour ... Km = 0.9 uM O2 (s.e. = 0.27)
growth_records.notes: Aerobic batch growth of Cloacibacterium sp. CB-01 in GranuCult nutrient broth (meat peptone + meat extract), pH 7.3, 23 C. mumaxO2=0.29 h-1 estimated by nonlinear regression of measured aerobic respiration during unrestricted growth. Doubling time = ln2/mu = 0.6931/0.29 = 2.39 h (calculated). Reported O2 respiration Vmax=0.72 fmol O2 cell-1 h-1; converted to mass basis using measured CDW 108 fg cell-1: 0.72 fmol/108 fg = 6.67 mmol O2 gDW-1 h-1 (fmol/fg = mol/g). Electron flow to O2 = 2.9 fmol e- cell-1 h-1 (reported). Apparent half-saturation Km(O2)=0.9 uM. Growth yields (reported): Y_O2=4e14 cells mol-1 O2, Y_e-O2=1.0e14 cells mol-1 e- = 11+/-0.8 g CDW mol-1 e-. No secreted products quantified (respiratory CO2 not measured).

up.method: reported (Vmax = mumax/Y; nonlinear regression of N2O reduction rates)
calculated: 0.66 fmol N2O cell-1 h-1 / 108 fg cell-1 = 6.11 mmol gDW-1 h-1
reported (electron flow rate per cell to N2O)

sec.method: calculated from stoichiometry N2O + 2e- + 2H+ -> N2 + H2O (1 N2 per N2O reduced): = qN2O = 0.66 fmol cell-1 h-1
calculated: 6.11 mmol N2O gDW-1 h-1 x 1 (N2/N2O) = 6.11 mmol N2 gDW-1 h-1

yields.Y_e-N2O_gCDW_per_mol_e: 9.2 +/- 0.6 g CDW mol-1 e- to N2O (= 85% of Y_e-O2)

growth_records.cite: Hiis et al. Unlocking bacterial potential to reduce farmland N2O emissions. Nature (2024). DOI:10.1038/s41586-024-07464-3. [PMC11168931]
growth_records.snippet: mumaxN2O = 0.11 h-1 (s.d. = 0.001) ... VmaxN2O = 0.66 fmol N2O per cell per hour ... Vmax e-N2O = 1.3 fmol of electrons to N2O per cell per hour ... Km = 12.9 uM N2O (s.e. = 1.2)
growth_records.notes: Anaerobic N2O-respiring batch growth of CB-01 (NNRB; reduces N2O to N2 via NosZII), same broth, pH 7.3, 23 C. mumaxN2O=0.11 h-1 by nonlinear regression. Doubling time = ln2/0.11 = 6.30 h (calculated). Vmax(N2O)=0.66 fmol N2O cell-1 h-1 (uptake of electron acceptor); mass basis = 0.66/108 fg = 6.11 mmol N2O gDW-1 h-1. Electron flow to N2O = 1.3 fmol e- cell-1 h-1. Secreted N2 computed from N2O+2e-+2H+->N2+H2O (1:1) => qN2=0.66 fmol cell-1 h-1 = 6.11 mmol gDW-1 h-1. Km(N2O)=12.9 uM. Yields (reported): Y_N2O=1.7e14 cells mol-1, Y_e-N2O=0.85e14 cells mol-1 e- = 9.2+/-0.6 g CDW mol-1 e-, which is 85% of aerobic Y_e-O2. Respiratory metabolism ~50% slower than aerobic.
